name: zclass_node_set_node_type
description: zClass_Class::gwNodeSetNodeType validates a node pointer and stores the low byte of the requested node type.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?gwNodeSetNodeType@zClass_Class@@YIHPAUzClass_NodePartial@@H@Z at 0x448330 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 44 bytes and the VC object symbol is 48 bytes with 4 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.
The native smoke verifies nodeType truncation to the low byte and the null-node error return.
